_doc: Narration scripts per scene per language. The TTS generator (melotts.py) reads this and produces one .wav per scene+lang in public/audio/narration/{lang}/{sceneKey}.wav. Each entry has a fixed seed for reproducibility — same text + same seed = byte-identical output, so re-running the generate script skips already-generated files unless --force.

PT._note: MeloTTS PT model has only 1 speaker (id 0). Speed 1.0 is natural; 1.1 = slightly faster, 0.9 = more deliberate.

EN._note: MeloTTS EN-US v2 has multiple accents: 0=EN-Default, 1=EN-US, 2=EN-BR, 3=EN-AU, 4=EN-INDIA. We use 0 for the brand neutral feel.

PT.text: Desenvolvimento com inteligência artificial. Com segurança.

EN.text: AI-powered development. Built with security in mind.

PT.text: Como acelerar com IA sem abrir mão da segurança?

EN.text: How do you ship AI-fast without compromising security?

PT.text: Três pilares. Code review automático em todo PR. Validação de vulnerabilidades antes do deploy. Compliance e audit trails desde o dia um.

EN.text: Three pillars. Automated code review on every PR. Vulnerability gates before deploy. Compliance and audit trails from day one.

PT.text: O resultado: sessenta por cento menos vulnerabilidades em produção.

EN.text: The result: sixty percent fewer vulnerabilities in production.

PT.text: Construa com IA. Construa com segurança. Luby.

EN.text: Build with AI. Build secure. Luby.
